combat_events.name: Ambush Attack
combat_events.description: One tribute ambushes another from hiding
narrative_templates: {attacker} launches a surprise attack on {defender} from their hiding spot, catching them completely off guard.
From the shadows, {attacker} strikes at {defender}, their weapon flashing in the dim light of the arena.
{defender} is suddenly confronted by {attacker} who has been stalking them for hours, waiting for the perfect moment.

combat_events.name: Weapon Clash
combat_events.description: Two tributes engage in direct combat with weapons
narrative_templates: {attacker} and {defender} clash violently, their weapons sparking as they fight for survival.
The arena echoes with the sounds of battle as {attacker} and {defender} engage in a brutal confrontation.
Weapons collide in a shower of sparks as {attacker} and {defender} battle fiercely for dominance.

combat_events.name: Alliance Betrayal
combat_events.description: A tribute betrays their alliance partner
narrative_templates: What seemed like a strong alliance crumbles as {attacker} turns on {defender}, their former partner.
{defender} trusted {attacker} too much, and now pays the price for that mistake.
The alliance between {attacker} and {defender} ends in bloodshed as betrayal rears its ugly head.

combat_events.name: Cornucopia Battle
combat_events.description: Tributes fight over supplies at the Cornucopia
narrative_templates: The Cornucopia becomes a battleground as multiple tributes fight desperately for the precious supplies within.
Chaos erupts at the Cornucopia as tributes clash in a frenzy of violence over life-saving resources.
The golden horn runs red with blood as tributes battle ferociously for control of the arena's supplies.

combat_events.name: Tracker Jacker Attack
narrative_templates: A swarm of deadly tracker jackers descends upon {defender}, their genetically engineered venom causing terrifying hallucinations.
{defender} is stung multiple times by the vicious wasps, their mind reeling from the engineered toxins.
The air fills with the angry buzzing of tracker jackers as they attack {defender}, driving them into panicked retreat.
